hypothesis: H3: claude_streaming=false — genuinely untested lever with current config. With streaming=false, Claude returns full response before TTS starts (TTFT becomes total_gen_ms). Expected to LOSS (full_gen ~950ms + TTS ~165ms = ~1115ms) but completes the search space.
notes: streaming=false: p95 790→1572ms; TTFT becomes full gen time (~1000ms p50 vs ~503ms streaming); streaming=true is required; confirms this lever is exhausted
